title: Ubiquiti UACC-Uplink-SFP28-0.15M - DAC cable, 1-25 Gbps, 0.15m
description: Passive DAC cable for direct connection of two SFP, SFP+, or SFP28 ports with a link speed of 25 Gbps. This cable is 0.15 meters long and is also available in 3m or 30m variants. The cable is ideal for creating short connections between switches, routers, and other UniFi devices. Supported data rates: 25/10/1 Gbps Compatible with: SFP, SFP+, SFP28 Automatic optimization of link speed and connection stability when connecting UniFi devices Cable length: 0.15m Supported data rates: 25/10/1 Gbps Compatible with: SFP, SFP+, SFP28 Automatic optimization of link speed and connection stability when connecting UniFi devices Cable length: 0.15m
